locators.label: SOIC package drawing and land pattern

sources.title: 24LC256 product status and family package availability

locators.label: Current product status, exact or family identity, package, and pin count

pins.name: WP
pins.function: Active-high write-protect input; must not float.

ratings.name: I2C clock frequency
ratings.qualifier: 24LC256 maximum at the specified supply and temperature conditions.

land_pattern.locator: datasheet pages 28-30, drawing C04-2057-SN Rev J; pads cross-checked against 1.27 mm pitch and 5.40 mm row spacing
land_pattern.coordinate_convention: Component centroid is (0,0); +x is right and +y is down in the top-view footprint; pin 1 is upper-left; pins increase counter-clockwise.

symbol.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 1.0 / KiCad 8 syntax
symbol.provenance: Original Lyon Industries native symbol serialized from the reviewed exact-MPN pin map.
limitations: The single-unit functional block prioritizes explicit pin names and electrical types over a stylized circuit symbol.

footprint.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 1.0 / KiCad 8 syntax
footprint.provenance: Original Lyon Industries native footprint serialized from the manufacturer land pattern and explicit reviewed pad coordinates.
limitations: Assembly-process solder-paste adjustments remain the responsibility of the consuming PCB design.

step_model.provenance: Original Lyon Industries nominal envelope model generated from the manufacturer body, height, terminal-span, and pad geometry.
limitations: The model is authoritative for nominal seating and clearance envelope only; it omits undocumented cosmetic, internal, and lead-form detail.

orientation.description: Pin-one or terminal orientation is documented; tape-pocket rotation and assembly-machine convention are not qualified here.
orientation.locator: 8-lead SOIC package drawing and recommended land pattern

notes: Keep WP, A0, A1, and A2 at defined levels and use I2C pull-ups sized for the bus.

findings.summary: Writes are page-bounded and require write-cycle completion polling; crossing a 64-byte page without software handling overwrites earlier bytes in that page.

checks.name: official source identity
checks.method: Reviewed the official manufacturer document and recorded its revision, locators, retrieval state, and hash when byte capture succeeded.

checks.name: pin and package extraction
checks.method: Compared the package-specific pin map with the manufacturer pin table and package section.

checks.name: independent product and package cross-check
checks.method: Compared the normalized exact or family identity, package code, pin count, and current manufacturer status against the official product page independently of the datasheet extraction.

checks.name: explicit land-pattern arithmetic
checks.method: Converted the manufacturer contact pitch, row spacing, pad width, and pad length into centroid coordinates, then independently recomputed adjacent pitch, symmetry, and pad count.

checks.name: independent product and package cross-check
checks.method: Compared the normalized exact or family identity, package code, pin count, and current manufacturer status against the official product page independently of the datasheet extraction.

checks.name: explicit land-pattern arithmetic
checks.method: Converted the manufacturer contact pitch, row spacing, pad width, and pad length into centroid coordinates, then independently recomputed adjacent pitch, symmetry, and pad count.

checks.name: native symbol pin-map verification
checks.method: Parsed the generated KiCad symbol and compared every pin number, name, and electrical type with the normalized exact-MPN pin map.

checks.name: native footprint geometry verification
checks.method: Parsed every KiCad pad number, centroid, and size; compared them with the explicit manufacturer-derived land-pattern record; inspected the top-view pad plot, pin-one mark, fabrication outline, and courtyard.

checks.name: STEP placement and envelope verification
checks.method: Reopened the STEP file with CadQuery/Open CASCADE, confirmed solid count, board-plane seating at z=0, manufacturer maximum height, body envelope, lead span, pin-one feature, and visually inspected an isometric tessellation.

checks.name: native symbol pin-map verification
checks.method: Parsed the generated KiCad symbol and compared every pin number, name, and electrical type with the normalized exact-MPN pin map.

checks.name: native footprint geometry verification
checks.method: Parsed every KiCad pad number, centroid, and size; compared them with the explicit manufacturer-derived land-pattern record; inspected the top-view pad plot, pin-one mark, fabrication outline, and courtyard.

checks.name: STEP placement and envelope verification
checks.method: Reopened the STEP file with CadQuery/Open CASCADE, confirmed solid count, board-plane seating at z=0, manufacturer maximum height, body envelope, lead span, pin-one feature, and visually inspected an isometric tessellation.

rights.normalized_record_origin: Original Lyon Industries normalization based on the linked official manufacturer source.
